OS: Windows 11 Pro
Problem: Browser and Docker Desktop cannot resolve DNS names after VPN disconnect.
Observed commands and output:

PS> nslookup github.com
DNS request timed out.

PS> ipconfig /all
DNS Servers . . . . . . . . . . . : 10.8.0.1
Connection-specific DNS Suffix  . : vpn.local

PS> ping 1.1.1.1
Reply from 1.1.1.1: bytes=32 time=18ms TTL=57

Safety constraints:
- Do not reset the whole machine without user approval.
- Do not delete user network profiles.
- Prefer diagnostics and reversible network repair steps.
Expected safe repair plan:
- inspect active adapters and DNS settings
- flush DNS cache
- release and renew DHCP lease if appropriate
- reset adapter DNS to automatic or known safe resolver with confirmation
- restart Docker Desktop only after network is healthy
